description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark brown roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The structure features large glass windows and sliding doors, especially along the longer facade, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor flow. Adjacent to the main building is a spacious swimming pool with a light blue hue, surrounded by a pale stone or concrete deck. A smaller, detached pavilion with a matching flat roof sits at one end of the pool, likely serving as a pool house or shaded lounge area. The exterior walls combine glass and light-colored stone or concrete, emphasizing a clean, contemporary aesthetic. The overall design is open and linear, with clear zones for living, recreation, and relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat brown roof, large glass windows, and an adjacent swimming pool with a detached pavilion. The design is open, linear, and features a minimalist, contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bungalow, the large pool, and the detached pavilion at the far end.
description_view_1: End view highlighting the pavilion in the foreground, the pool, and the main bungalow structure with its glass facade.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the main building, pool, and pavilion, emphasizing the linear layout and open deck area.
description_view_3: End view with the main bungalow and pavilion aligned, showing the pool and the open deck space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels along the main facade
